content: Remote OK Executive Assistant EfficientAide <p>*Please note that this job is not for EfficientAide. It's for our client who is based in California. This is a full-time, remote role.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>WHO WE ARE</strong></p><p><span>Our client is a leading creative technology agency that builds what's next. Since 2008, they have partnered with the world's most ambitious brands to transform breakthrough technology into extraordinary human experiences, delivering end-to-end digital transformation for companies including Google, Amazon, and Meta.</span></p><ul><li><span>Enterprise Digital: Architecting seamless digital ecosystems that simplify complexity and drive measurable impact</span></li><li><span>Product Innovation: Building scalable platforms and products that identify and seize emerging technology opportunities</span></li><li><span>Experiential/Immersive: Creating cross-media experiences that blend digital, social, AI, and physical spaces</span></li><li><span>Applied AI: Transforming AI from a tool into the infrastructure for business evolution, powering smarter decision-making and game-changing innovation</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>THE ROLE</strong></p><p><span>Our client is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Executive Assistant to provide comprehensive support to their leadership team. This person will primarily serve as the right-hand partner to the COO, with calendar and travel management support for the CEO and CTO. The ideal candidate is fully self-sufficient, thinks ahead before being asked, and clears obstacles before they become problems.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE</strong></p><p><span>This role has seen turnover due to a lack of proactivity and self-direction. The person who thrives here does not wait to be told what to do. They anticipate needs, own their work end-to-end, and bring calm, organized energy to a fast-paced leadership team. Thick skin and a low-ego approach to supporting executives is essential.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>EXECUTIVE SUPPORT</strong></p><ul><li><span>Proactively manage complex calendars and schedule meetings across multiple time zones for the CEO, CTO, and COO</span></li><li><span>Serve as a true right-hand partner to the COO, anticipating needs and removing obstacles before they arise</span></li><li><span>Act as a central communication hub across email, Slack, and shared calendars</span></li><li><span>Leverage AI-powered tools (Superhuman, Fyxer, or similar) to draft, refine, and manage email correspondence efficiently</span></li><li><span>Process and oversee expense reports within our ERP, including receipt forwarding and inbox rules for streamlined submission</span></li><li><span>Manage all aspects of domestic and occasional international travel, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation (note: travel for this role is minimal, with one annual team gathering in Los Angeles)</span></li><li><span>Prepare and edit professional communications, presentations, and documents with exceptional attention to detail</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>PROJECT AND TASK MANAGEMENT</strong></p><ul><li><span>Take full ownership of assigned tasks and projects, driving them to completion with minimal oversight</span></li><li><span>Manage and prioritize a fluctuating workload, surfacing urgent items to leadership proactively</span></li><li><span>Maintain comprehensive to-do lists for executives, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks</span></li><li><span>Lead special projects as needed, such as auditing projects on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and coordinating across teams to gather and consolidate information</span></li><li><span>Conduct focused research to support strategic initiatives, including emerging areas like prompt engineering and AI tooling</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>GENERAL ADMINISTRATION</strong></p><ul><li><span>Monitor executive inboxes, flag urgent items, and ensure timely responses</span></li><li><span>Provide comprehensive administrative support to maintain smooth daily operations</span></li><li><span>Assist with the coordination of company events and People Operations logistics</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>WHAT YOU WILL NEED TO SUCCEED</strong></p><ul><li><span>Proven experience supporting multiple executives in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment</span></li><li><span>Exceptional organizational skills with the ability to prioritize effectively and meet deadlines without hand-holding</span></li><li><span>Native proficiency with AI-powered tools (Superhuman, Fyxer, or similar) to multiply your own efficiency</span></li><li><span>Advanced expertise in calendar management and meeting scheduling across platforms</span></li><li><span>Experience with enterprise expense systems, preferably Maconomy</span></li><li><span>Advanced proficiency in Google Workspace</span></li><li><span>Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a sharp eye for detail</span></li><li><span>Proactive, resourceful problem-solver with a strong sense of ownership and accountability</span></li><li><span>Ability to handle highly confidential information with discretion and professionalism</span></li><li><span>Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build trust quickly with diverse stakeholders</span></li><li><span>Travel booking and itinerary management experience</span></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>EQUIPMENT</strong></p><p><span>Left Field Labs will provide a MacBook. This is a fully remote role with core hours aligned to Pacific Time, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>OUR VALUES</strong></p><p><span>We hire for skill and retain for culture. The person who thrives here will see themselves in these commitments:</span></p><p><strong>Empathetic&nbsp; </strong><span>We seek to understand and share perspectives to have the most impact.</span></p><p><strong>Authentic&nbsp; </strong><span>We are honest and candid with one another.</span></p><p><strong>Relentless&nbsp; </strong><span>We step up to challenges and prioritize action.</span></p><p><strong>Do the Right Thing&nbsp; </strong><span>We fight for what's right to achieve our goals.</span></p><p><strong>Voracious Learners&nbsp; </strong><span>We have an insatiable appetite to learn, grow, and evolve.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS</strong></p><p><span>
